since_last: 47% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.23% · Gold +0.24% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 47% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.94%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.94%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.12%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -9.46%
cards.body: Leaders: ASML +4.16%, INTC +3.04%, AMAT +3.03%, LRCX +2.89%, MRVL +2.87%. Laggards: SNAP -9.46%, SMR -5.55%, SOUN -3.96%, VRT -3.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.39% at $204.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.39% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
